name: Sumo Logic
description: Cloud-native SIEM and log analytics platform. Monitor collectors and data ingestion.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Sumo Logic
2. Go to Administration > Security > Access Keys
3. Click + Add Access Key
4. Copy the Access ID and Access Key
5. Determine your API URL from your login URL region (e.g. https://api.us2.sumologic.com)
6. Enter all values below

credentialFields.label: Access ID
credentialFields.helpText: Your Sumo Logic Access ID. Go to Administration > Security > Access Keys.

credentialFields.label: Access Key
credentialFields.helpText: Your Sumo Logic Access Key (generated with the Access ID).

credentialFields.label: API Endpoint URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Sumo Logic API URL based on region (e.g. https://api.us2.sumologic.com, https://api.eu.sumologic.com). See docs for your deployment region.

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies Sumo Logic API is accessible.

checks.name: Monitoring & Alerting
checks.description: Verifies log collection is active with Sumo Logic collectors.
